text.title: Single Operator Funnel Rubric Decision Tree
text.summary: Run-or-skip gate based on preconditions, then a second-level question routing to a rule-id conclusion. Minimum-form tree for a methodology of this shape.

decision-tree.root-question: Are all four evidence sources reachable in ≤5 minutes each (visit, signup, paid, retained)?

branch.question: Is at least one stage showing a negative WoW delta?

branch.conclusion: Tag BROKEN_STAGE = largest-drop stage; commit one investigation for next week.
Log all four absolutes + zero/positive deltas; no broken_stage needed this week.
Skip this week. Fix the slow evidence source first — extending the 20-minute budget is forbidden.

text.example: visit=Plausible-uniques signup=Postgres paid=Stripe retained=Postgres-d28; deltas=+5%/-12%/-3%/+1% → broken_stage=signup (largest drop); next_action='audit signup form for new mobile flow'.
